event_name: River Market Farmers Market — Season Opening

seo.title: River Market Farmers Market Season Opening 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: The River Market Farmers Market opens for the 2026 season. Fresh produce, local vendors, food trucks, and a classic Little Rock Saturday morning.

venue_address: 400 President Clinton Ave, Little Rock, AR 72201
description: The River Market Farmers Market is a Little Rock institution, running Saturday mornings in the riverside pavilion from April through October. Opening Day draws double the usual crowd — vendors bring their best of the early spring harvest, baked goods are flying, and the coffee and breakfast vendors are doing brisk business by 7:15 AM. Expect fresh strawberries, bedding plants, artisan cheese, honey, locally roasted coffee, and handmade goods from 60+ vendors. Dogs on leashes are welcome, strollers navigate well, and the whole thing is a genuinely pleasant way to start a Saturday in downtown Little Rock.
